ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date on which the security goes ex-dividend */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid */,
  "eps_payout_ratio" TEXT /* Earnings per share payout ratio, if available */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is paid out */,
  "yield_rate" TEXT /* Yield percentage of the dividend */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated security */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the dividend amount */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the shareholders of record are determined */,
  "declared_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is declared by the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dividend (e.g., upcoming, paid, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for stock market listings */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, ETF) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the security */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last trading price of the security */,
  "last_price_date" TEXT /* Date of the last trading price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the portfolio was created */,
  "target_return" REAL /* Target return rate for the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_securities" (
  "portfolio_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-security association */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated portfolio */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated security */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was purchased */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the portfolio security was updated */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* The cost basis of the security in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_securities_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_report" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis report (e.g., draft, complete, reviewed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date and time the analysis report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dividend */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was generated */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., upcoming payout, new dividend) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, dismissed) */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* The date and time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source (e.g., market data API) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, FTP) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the data source was updated */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which data is updated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_data" (
  "security_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the security data record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated security */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source providing the data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data record */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data recorded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data recorded (e.g., price, volume, dividend yield) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last date and time the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividend_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend history record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated security */,
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated dividend */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the dividend performance was recorded */,
  "historical_yield" REAL /* Yield recorded on that date */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount for the historical record */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Ex-dividend date for the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_dividend_id FOREIGN KEY ("dividend_id") REFERENCES dividends ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividend_history_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON structure defining permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date and time the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
